projectName: NoLangX: Natural Language Smart Contract Agent
hackathon: Microsoft AI Agents Hackathon (April 8-30 2026) - $50K+ AI Agents Track
description: NoLangX is an autonomous AI agent framework enabling non-crypto-native users to deploy smart contracts via natural language. The agent accepts text/voice commands like 'Create a staking pool with 12% APY that accepts USDC', decomposes intent into structured spec, generates Solidity code via LLM, performs static analysis for common vulnerabilities (reentrancy, overflow), creates a ZK proof attesting to code correctness without revealing source, and deploys to target EVM chain. Built with Node.js
angle: AI agents that translate natural language intent into audited Solidity contracts, deployable across multiple EVMs, with ZK proof-of-correctness generation for verifiability without revealing logic
